stonetop.summary: A bronze guardian animated by a hearth-spirit — loyal, overzealous, and a hazard to the furniture.

system.concept: A bronze guardian animated by a hearth-spirit — loyal, overzealous, and a hazard to the furniture.
system.description: So long as a fire burns in its stove-like chest, a hearth-spirit animates this bronze construct, which serves its keeper as a follower. Durable and vigilant, it guards with overzealous devotion — looming, belching smoke, and starting the occasional fire. It is fireproof but needs a smithy and tools to mend, and runs down as its fuel burns low. Its cost is profuse gratitude.
